Localization.Description: Attempt to assign a session ID to a user

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user with ID {subject.account.id} is assigned session ID {subject.account.session_id} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to assign session ID {subject.account.session_id} to user {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to assign session ID {subject.account.session_id} to the user with ID {subject.account.id} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} is assigned session ID {subject.account.session_id} on host {event_src.host}
